object_a.label: cabinet
object_a.description: dark wood upper and lower kitchen cabinets along left back wall
object_a.long_form_open_description: Continuous run of dark-stained wood cabinetry (upper and lower) along the left portion of the back kitchen wall. Flat paneled doors with subtle trim, likely a modern transitional finish. Countertop beneath the upper cabinets hosts small appliances and kitchen items.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: Runs left from the central window and microwave area; above and beside the countertop appliances (coffee maker, toaster).
